title: Collections
description: A user-curated, named grouping of articles — either hand-picked or defined by a saved smart-query — used to organize research.

title.description: the collection's display name shown in the collections list

description.description: optional longer note explaining what this collection is for

kind.description: 'manual' (curator adds articles by hand) or 'smart' (membership derived from query)

query.description: the saved smart-collection query (tags/keywords/filters) used to auto-match articles when kind is 'smart'

pinned.description: whether this collection is pinned to the top of the collections list

articleCount.description: denormalized count of articles currently filed in this collection

items.description: the article memberships filed under this collection

briefings.description: research briefings scoped to this collection
